title: sabiaceae
intro: The Sabiaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a small, monogeneric family consisting of only one genus, Sabia, which is native to tropical and subtropical Asia. Members of the Sabiaceae family are characterized by their distinctive flowers, which are often surrounded by a crown of modified leaves. The Sabiaceae family is part of the larger group of plants known as flowering plants, and is often considered a distinct group due to its unique characteristics.
